summary: Iteration 6 testing completed - Email Webhooks & Templates feature fully functional. All 32 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI working correctly with all components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: All webhook endpoints (SendGrid, Mailgun, Generic) implemented correctly and accept events
Template categories endpoint returns all 6 categories with proper structure
Template CRUD operations work correctly - create, read, update, delete
AI template generation creates templates with proper variables extraction
AI template personalization substitutes variables correctly
Frontend displays categories sidebar, template cards with stats, and preview panel
Variable substitution in preview works in real-time
All endpoints require authentication except categories (returns 403 without token)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all components load, forms work, filtering works, preview works)

seed_data_creation: Multiple AI-generated templates created during testing (Fintech API Security Outreach, B2B Cold Outreach for Meeting, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email Webhooks & Templates feature at /email-templates is fully functional. Key endpoints tested: POST /api/email-templates/webhook/sendgrid (SendGrid events), POST /api/email-templates/webhook/mailgun (Mailgun events), POST /api/email-templates/webhook/generic (generic events with auth), GET /api/email-templates/templates/categories (6 categories), GET /api/email-templates/templates (list all), GET /api/email-templates/templates/{id} (get specific), POST /api/email-templates/templates (create custom), PUT /api/email-templates/templates/{id} (update), DELETE /api/email-templates/templates/{id} (delete), POST /api/email-templates/templates/{id}/personalize (AI personalization), POST /api/email-templates/templates/generate (AI generation), POST /api/email-templates/templates/{id}/create-draft (create draft). Frontend has 3-column layout: Categories sidebar (left), Templates grid (middle), Preview panel (right). AI Generate and Create Template buttons in header.

backend: Auth required tests - PASS (all endpoints return 403 without token)
frontend: All 6 categories displayed (Cold Outreach, Follow-Up, Meeting Request, Value Proposition, Social Proof, Breakup) - PASS
All Templates button with count - PASS
Template cards with name, description, stats - PASS
Open rate, reply rate, variables count displayed - PASS
Create Template form fields (name, category, description, subject, body, bestFor) - PASS
AI Generate form fields (description, category, tone, targetAudience, goal) - PASS
AI template generation - PASS (form closes after generation)

sendgrid_webhook.details: Accepts delivered, open, click, bounce, spamreport, unsubscribe events. Supports batch events.

mailgun_webhook.details: Accepts delivered, opened, clicked, bounced, complained, unsubscribed events via form data.

generic_webhook.details: Requires authentication. Accepts open, click, reply, bounce events with metadata.

template_categories.details: Returns 6 categories: cold_outreach, follow_up, meeting_request, value_proposition, social_proof, breakup

template_listing.details: Returns 8 default templates + custom templates. Supports category filtering.

template_crud.details: Create, read, update, delete custom templates. Auto-extracts variables from {{variable}} syntax.

ai_personalization.details: Substitutes variables in template. Can auto-fill from prospect data. Uses Gemini AI for missing variables.

ai_generation.details: Generates new templates from description with tone, category, target audience, and goal options.

draft_creation.details: Creates email draft from template with personalization for specific prospect.

frontend_ui.details: 3-column layout with categories, templates, and preview. All forms functional.

mocked_apis.none: All APIs use real Gemini AI via emergentintegrations for template generation and personalization
